title: lophanthus chinensis
intro: Lophanthus chinensis, also known as Chuan Xin Lian, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lophanthus chinensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include drying and processing its leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal use.
